posts.author: El_Greco (Angelo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear monday.com team,
first of all: I found the “Drag and drop subitems” Feature request but as this one is in the same group and item, this is not sufficient.

My feature request:
mark multiple subitems and move all of them by dragging them with the mouse

Explanation
We use our monday board for standardised process steps by useing a large amount of subitems unter each item. Someteimes it is necessary to move multiple subitems with in others under the same item. So marking them and using the “move” option does not work.

To be clear:
It’s not about moving them to another item or group or board.
It’s about moving them inside a large amount (approx. 80) of subitems unter one item.

Would be grat to make this possible.
Hope for many votes to this feature
